_comment: Post-Battle Campaign Events D100 Table (Core Rules p.126-128)
name: campaign_events

result.name: Local Friends
result.description: You've made friends in the area.

result.name: Lucky Break
result.description: Fortune smiles on the crew.

result.name: New Ally
result.description: A new ally offers support.

result.name: Valuable Find
result.description: You discover something worth selling.

result.name: Windfall
result.description: An unexpected financial windfall.

result.name: Odd Job
result.description: A quick side job earns some credits.

result.name: Unexpected Bill
result.description: An unexpected expense arrives.

result.name: Life Support Issues
result.description: Life support systems need urgent repair.

result.name: Old Contact
result.description: An old contact passes along useful information.

result.name: Valuable Intel
result.description: You intercept valuable intelligence.

result.name: Information Broker
result.description: A broker offers rumors for 2 credits each (up to 3).

result.name: Dangerous Information
result.description: Sensitive info draws unwanted attention.

result.name: Mouthed Off
result.description: Someone in the crew offended the wrong people.

result.name: Made Enemy
result.description: Your actions have earned you a new enemy.

result.name: Suspicious Activity
result.description: A rival is tracking your movements.

result.name: Settled Business
result.description: An opportunity to resolve old grudges.

result.name: Rival Truce
result.description: A rival offers to settle differences — for a price.

result.name: Reputation Grows
result.description: Word of your deeds is spreading.

result.name: New Patron
result.description: A new patron seeks your services.

result.name: Patron Request
result.description: A patron has an urgent job with bonus pay.

result.name: Patron Fallout
result.description: Relations with a patron have soured.

result.name: Market Surplus
result.description: A glut of goods drives prices down.

result.name: Trade Opportunity
result.description: An exceptional trade deal presents itself.

result.name: Equipment Malfunction
result.description: A piece of equipment breaks down.

result.name: Ship Parts
result.description: Salvageable ship parts found.

result.name: Friendly Doc
result.description: A friendly doctor offers medical help.

result.name: Medical Supplies
result.description: Medical supplies allow immediate recovery.

result.name: Skill Training
result.description: Downtime allows for focused skill practice.

result.name: Crew Bonding
result.description: Shared experience strengthens the crew.

result.name: Bar Brawl
result.description: A crew member gets into a bar fight.

result.name: Gambling Opportunity
result.description: A chance to test your luck at the tables.

result.name: Cargo Opportunity
result.description: A cargo hauling job with quick pay.

result.name: Tax Collection
result.description: Local authorities demand payment.

result.name: Government Inspection
result.description: Officials want to inspect your cargo.

result.name: Bureaucratic Delay
result.description: Red tape prevents departure.

result.name: Crew Dispute
result.description: Internal tensions flare up.

result.name: War Rumors
result.description: Rumors of impending conflict spread.

result.name: Invasion Warning
result.description: Intelligence reports suggest an imminent invasion.

result.name: Refugee Crisis
result.description: Displaced civilians need assistance.

result.name: Bad Reputation
result.description: Negative rumors damage your standing.

result.name: Reputation Boost
result.description: Word of your deeds improves your reputation.

result.name: Pickpocketed
result.description: A crew member's pockets are picked.

result.name: Strange Signal
result.description: An unusual signal contains quest information.

result.name: Alien Artifact
result.description: A mysterious alien artifact is discovered.

result.name: Local Festival
result.description: A local celebration lifts spirits but raises prices.
